fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 37-year-old African American female with schizoaffective disorder for medication check.
fields.Subjective: Patient presented appearing well-groomed and upbeat. Reports perfect adherence to brexpiprazole 4 mg daily taken each morning using pill timer. States feeling wonderful. No hallucinations for eight months. No delusional thoughts. Sleep excellent at 8 hours nightly. Appetite good, weight stable at 156 lbs. Working full-time as administrative assistant at law firm, performing excellently. Mood 'really happy' rated 9/10. Lives independently in condo she recently purchased. Active in professional women's networking group. Enjoys salsa dancing classes twice weekly. Attending therapy biweekly for wellness. Five years sober from alcohol. Dating and building social network. Feels accomplished. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Dr. Denise Howard, MD, Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Professionally dressed, excellent grooming, bright affect

fields.Diagnostic_Impression: Schizoaffective Disorder, in sustained full remission.
fields.Psychosocial_Context: Homeowner; employed full-time at law firm; five years sober; active socially and professionally; excellent recovery.
Assessment_and_Plan: Outstanding medication adherence and sustained remission.
Congratulated on home purchase and career success.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. Denise Howard, MD, Psychiatrist — Professional Women's Mental Wellness, 2341 Corporate Plaza, Washington, DC 20001, Phone: (555) 772-4498, Fax: (555) 772-4499
